brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 14 with valid step-by-step modeling of deletion and generation; goes one level deeper than stating a formula by modeling the two-step mechanism per day in a table, but doesn't explore compounding dynamics or edge cases; rechecks each row implicitly through the table structure but never reflects on the reasoning method or potential misinterpretations; shows intermediate values that allow row-by-row checking but performs no explicit sanity check or re-derivation from a different angle; presents conclusions without uncertainty or acknowledgment of modeling assumptions (e.g., that deletion happens before generation); considers only the single modeling approach with no discussion of alternative interpretations; every derivation is shown in the table with sufficient detail that a third party could reproduce the full chain.
